name: Ceribell, Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1. Busin ess. Overview We are a medical technology company focused on transforming the diagnosis and management of patients with serious neurological conditions. We have developed the Ceribell System, a novel, point-of-care EEG platform specifically designed to address the unmet needs of patients in the acute care setting.
